rationale: Server selection spec excludes recovering members; driver attempts auth against them, violating eligibility rules.
HTML entity escaping bug in json_util.dumps; Python-specific serialization bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
Spurious UserWarning about read preference on direct connection; internal warning logic, not a spec requirement.
Driver retries auth on recovering member after primary hangup; server selection spec excludes recovering members.
ReadPreference instances not copyable; Python-specific object protocol issue, no spec rule involved.
Monitor thread crashes on auth failure during resync; internal exception handling bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Driver sends commands to secondary without slaveOk bit on direct connection; wire protocol and server selection requirement.
listDatabases command missing slaveOk bit on direct secondary connection; same spec violation as PYTHON-920.
cursor.alive stays True after connection loss; implementation behavior, cursor spec does not define alive semantics on network failure.
Server selection spec prohibits routing reads to arbiters; NEAREST violates this by including arbiters as candidates.
Documentation request to mention log4mongo-python external tool; no spec or driver behavior involved.
Request to add changelog entry about bson.int64.Int64 type change; documentation, not a spec violation.
Request to document MongoClient.nodes non-static behavior; documentation improvement, no spec issue.
Auth test flakiness from unhandled network exceptions; robustness bug in error handling, no specific spec rule cited.
Server selection spec allows localThresholdMS=0; driver rejects it, contradicting spec-defined parameter semantics.
Insert hangs on large collection; thin description, likely user error or unrelated internal hang, no spec rule cited.
CMAP spec defines maxPoolSize=0 as unlimited; driver allows it but hangs, violating spec-defined pool behavior.
Unhelpful error message when connecting to MySQL; UX improvement, no spec involvement.
GSSAPI broken by internal rename of host to address; implementation typo, not a spec rule violation.
Connect falls back to localhost; thin description, unclear if spec-covered behavior violated.
is_primary reports false due to timing; SDAM spec does not define is_primary property semantics, internal state exposure.
Connection string spec requires SSL options via URI; ssl_match_hostname not parseable from URI string.
Incorrect changelog guidance about renamed find parameters; documentation error, no spec violation.
Projection tuple no longer accepted by find(); API regression, CRUD spec does not mandate tuple support for projections.
Monitor threads slow to terminate on shutdown; internal threading lifecycle issue, not a spec requirement.
Orphan thread leak; internal resource management bug, no spec rule defines thread lifecycle.
Feature request to disable hostname validation in TLS; enhancement with no existing spec requirement violated.
Infinite loop on corrupt GridFS chunk; error-handling robustness bug, GridFS spec does not define behavior for corrupt data.
Text index on all fields ($**) fails; index key validation bug, no specific index management spec rule cited.
BSON ObjectId spec accepts bytes; Python 3 driver rejects bytes() instance despite documented support.
Documentation request to recommend TxMongo for production; no spec or driver behavior involved.
Request for rich comparison methods on write operation objects; API ergonomics, not a spec requirement.
Unclear error message for Unix Domain Socket connection failure; UX improvement, no spec issue.
BSON spec defines handling of invalid UTF-8; driver crashes cursor; related CSHARP-694 and JAVA-1305 indicate cross-driver issue.
ReadPreference __eq__ returns NotImplementedError instead of NotImplemented; Python API convention issue, no spec involvement.
GridFS operations fail for read-only users; links SPEC-169, description says spec needed for this case drivers-wide.
Connections fail when initializing MongoClient from forked multiprocessing threads; fork-safety issue, no spec rule covers this.
Coverity: unchecked NULL return from PyObject_Call in C extension; static analysis finding, no spec involved.
Extended JSON spec requires NaN to be represented as special value; json_util emits bare NaN violating JSON RFC and BSON extended JSON.
Security improvement: use constant-time hash comparison; proactive hardening, no existing spec rule violated.
Feature request to name driver threads for debuggability; implementation ergonomics, no spec involvement.
BSON Binary not hashable in Python 3; Python version compat issue, BSON spec does not define hashability.

HOST and PORT class properties return wrong values; internal implementation detail, not a spec-defined property.

update_one missing manipulate parameter passthrough; internal API surface issue, not a CRUD spec requirement.
